name: Londonberry Turned Metal Accent Table Black - Threshold™
description:
Bring sleek, understated style to your indoor decor with this Londonberry Turned Metal Accent Table from Threshold™. Featuring a solid aluminum frame and a slender design, this metal accent table makes for a stylish and functional accent piece that can be easily moved from place to place. Perfect for displaying anything from small potted plants, picture frames, books and more, this black accent table comes with a round tabletop with slightly raised edges and a matching round base, helping to avoid any spillage while making for a stable base. Whether used in the living room or as part of your home office decor, you'll love the sleek style it adds to your indoor decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
